objective: Extend GroveConfig::load with a legacy-migration branch that reads .grove/explore.json, synthesises a GroveConfig (mode=McpLlm, mapped steering), rewrites to config.json atomically, and emits a one-time deprecation warning.
key_changes: Made Provider::from_name and Steering::from_name pub(crate) in explore/config.rs to allow use from config.rs.
Added pub(crate) DEPRECATION_WARNING const — named constant makes the warning testable without stderr capture.
Added private LegacyExploreRaw struct mirroring old explore.json wire shape with 'mode' as the steering key.
Added migrate_from_legacy_explore(root): reads explore.json, maps mode→Steering and provider→Provider, builds GroveConfig{McpLlm}, validates, saves config.json atomically, emits warning.
Extended GroveConfig::load to three-branch cascade: config.json present → existing path; explore.json present → migration; neither → actionable error.
Test 5a: migrate_legacy_explore_writes_config_json — mode=McpLlm, steering=Balanced (from mode=balanced), config.json exists after migration.
Test 5b: second_load_after_migration_reads_config_not_legacy — second load returns equal config; explore.json mtime unchanged.
Test 5c: config_json_present_ignores_stale_explore_json — config.json wins; stale explore.json silently ignored.
Test 5d: deprecation_warning_emitted — asserts DEPRECATION_WARNING contains key strings; exercises migration side-effect.
All 261 tests pass (155 unit + 77 CLI + 28 integration + 1 doc-test). Clippy -D warnings clean.
